productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Dry Cleaning Shoe Kit
description: Get dirty, that's why timberland created timberland product care line to help you clean and protect your footwear. The dry cleaning kit includes a brush and one cleaner bar.Method of application Use the brush to remove loose or dried dirt To remove stains, rub the cleaner bar lightly back and forth over the affected area Use the brush to remove the residue and raise the nap Test on a small inconspicuous area before applying full application For use on nubuck, suede or canvas
